title: Table of Offenses and Penalties for Foreign Employers
content: This section outlines offenses and corresponding penalties for foreign employers in the context of overseas employment of OFWs. Specifically, it addresses: a. and b. Default on contractual obligations to the migrant worker and/or to its Philippine agent; Gross violation of laws, rules and regulations. The penalties for the first offense include suspension, and for the second offense, disqualification.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
